NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR SEP-10-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-27-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 5, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MOVING PARTY MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND ANY REPLY PAPERS TO DEPT. 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM ON JUNE 26 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR # 4780

LAW AND MOTION, 302,PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK HAS NOT SATISFIED ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION TO SHOW THE TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE PARTIES' AGREEMENT INCLUDING THE INTEREST AND LATE PAYMENT FEES APPARENTLY ASSESSED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO THE DECLARATION OF LINDA SALAS ARE SUSTAINED. ORDER SIGNED. (302/HEK) JUDGE HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-05-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2012 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
Appearances: James A. Michel (951.4949) for defendant and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. American Express Centurion Bank has not satisfied its burden of production to show the terms and conditions of the parties' agreement including the interest and late payment fees apparently assessed to defendant. Defendant's objections to the declaration of Linda Salas are sustained. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge Harold Kahn; Not reported

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Continued To Jul-05-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Continued to July 5, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to give the moving party an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must provide courtesy copies of the moving and any reply papers to Dept. 302 no later than 4pm on June 26 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Joe Vickstein CSR # 4780

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
